items.name: Al Bhed Primers in Home

route.why: Four primers burn with Home — sweep every room before the story moves

items.notes: Living quarters, main corridor and environs. Home is destroyed at the end of this beat; these volumes are gone forever after.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer — Via Purifico

route.why: On the floor of the underwater maze — no second visit

items.notes: Grab it during Yuna's escape section. Bevelle's halls are closed afterward.

items.name: All other Al Bhed Primers
items.notes: The rest stay collectible (compilation spheres can copy previously found volumes). Full literacy pays off in Rikku's Home and the Omega Ruins chatter.

items.name: Valefor's second Overdrive

route.why: Talk to the dog — in HD, Dark Valefor later makes returning suicidal

items.notes: A girl in the shop and then the dog by the temple yield Energy Blast. In the HD remaster, Dark Valefor camps Besaid's entrance once you're branded traitors.

items.name: Destruction Sphere treasures

route.why: Take each temple's hidden treasure during its first visit

items.notes: Besaid, Kilika, Djose, Macalania, Bevelle, Zanarkand. All six are needed for Anima. In HD, Dark Aeons block several return trips — treat each first visit as the only visit.

items.name: Jecht Spheres ×10

route.why: Start the circuit — they unlock Auron's overdrives

items.notes: First one drops from Spherimorph. Besaid, S.S. Liki, Luca stadium, Mi'ihen, Moonflow, Macalania woods and more — a few sit behind HD Dark Aeon territory, so sweep early where possible.

items.name: Yojimbo

route.why: Haggle the mercenary down while you're in the gorge

items.notes: Offer roughly half his ask and counter three times. In HD, Dark Yojimbo lurks on later revisits — finish the cavern in one trip.

items.name: Sun Crest

route.why: Climb back up immediately after the dome's boss — Dark Bahamut guards it later (HD)

items.notes: The chest appears in the boss room right after the fight. Leave the dome without it and the HD remaster puts Dark Bahamut between you and Tidus' ultimate weapon.

items.name: Celestial Mirror

route.why: Chocobo race for the Cloudy Mirror, then the family in the woods upgrades it

items.notes: The key to every ultimate weapon chest and crest slot.

items.name: Anima

route.why: Dive back to Baaj once the airship flies

items.notes: Seymour's mother waits beneath the ruins where the game nearly drowned you.

items.name: The Magus Sisters
items.notes: Blossom Crown (capture Gagazet's fiends) + Flower Sceptre (beat Belgemine's Bahamut) open the sealed door.

items.name: Caladbolg (Tidus)
items.notes: Beat the chocobo trainer's race to open the chest, then the Sun Sigil demands 0:00.0 in the balloon race. The sigil race is the hard part.

items.name: Nirvana (Yuna)
items.notes: Capture one of each Calm Lands species. Moon Crest is on Besaid beach (HD: Dark Valefor territory); Moon Sigil comes from defeating all of Belgemine's aeons at Remiem.

items.name: World Champion (Wakka)
items.notes: Requires blitzball standing. Jupiter Crest in the Aurochs' locker room; Jupiter Sigil from league prizes with Attack/Status/Aurochs Reels learned.

items.name: God-hand (Rikku)
items.notes: Input GODHAND at the airship console. Mercury Crest in Sanubia's sandpit; Mercury Sigil from the Village of the Cactuars gauntlet.

items.name: Masamune (Auron)
items.notes: Mars Crest on the Old Mi'ihen Road; Mars Sigil for unlocking ten Monster Arena creations. Offer the crest at the sealed statue.

items.name: Onion Knight (Lulu)
items.notes: Venus Crest in the Farplane; Venus Sigil for dodging 200 consecutive lightning bolts. Yes, two hundred.

items.name: Spirit Lance (Kimahri)
items.notes: Pray at the three cactuar stones, catch the ghost. Saturn Crest on Gagazet; Saturn Sigil from the butterfly hunts in Macalania.

items.name: Monster Arena

route.why: Buy capture weapons now — everything endgame routes through the arena

items.notes: Capture fiends across Spira to breed the originals. Funds, sigils, and the best training in the game.

items.name: Blitzball & the Reels
items.location: Luca stadium — anywhere via save spheres

route.why: The first tournament is scripted into the story — league prizes start here

items.notes: Wakka's overdrive Reels are league/tournament prizes; they also gate his Jupiter Sigil. Recruitable free agents rotate, so check contracts after story beats.

items.name: Airship passwords & coordinates
items.notes: GODHAND, VICTORIOUS, MURASA as passwords; Baaj and the Sanubia ruins via hidden coordinates. Free gear for typing.

items.name: Dark Aeons
items.notes: Valefor at Besaid, Ifrit at Bikanel, Ixion on the Thunder Plains, Shiva at Macalania, Bahamut at the Zanarkand Dome, Yojimbo in the cavern, Anima at Baaj, the Magus Sisters on Gagazet. Superboss tier — approach with a finished grid.

items.name: Penance
items.notes: Appears after every Dark Aeon falls. The true final exam.
